title: Iran claims it shot down 'F-18' fighter jet over Chabahar; US fact-check tells a different story
summary_full: US Central Command has debunked Iranian claims of shooting down an American F-18 fighter jet near Chabahar.  CENTCOM explicitly stated on X that no US fighter aircraft have been downed by Iran, refuting footage shared by Iranian state media. This denial comes as Iran rejected a US ceasefire proposal, insisting on its own terms for ending hostilities.
